// Package spec is a fixture package for rimsky-docs-template-ref tests. It
// mirrors the shape of rimsky's lib/foundation/spec package: exported structs
// with yaml/json tags, a typed string enum, and an untyped const group.
package spec

import "encoding/json"

// WidgetSpec is the top-level fixture template root.
type WidgetSpec struct {
	// Name of the widget template.
	Name string `yaml:"name" json:"name"`
	// Description is optional prose.
	Description string `yaml:"description,omitempty" json:"description,omitempty"`
	// Parts are the nested directive entries.
	Parts []WidgetPart `yaml:"parts,omitempty" json:"parts,omitempty"`
	// Labels is free-form metadata.
	Labels map[string]string `yaml:"labels,omitempty" json:"labels,omitempty"`
	// Mode selects the widget mode.
	Mode WidgetMode `yaml:"mode" json:"mode"`
	// Config is opaque producer bytes (json-only tag).
	Config json.RawMessage `json:"config,omitempty"`
}

// WidgetPart is one nested directive in a WidgetSpec.
type WidgetPart struct {
	Kind     string `yaml:"kind" json:"kind"`
	Optional bool   `yaml:"optional,omitempty" json:"optional,omitempty"`
}

// WidgetMode is the fixture typed string enum.
type WidgetMode string

const (
	// WidgetModeFast is the fast mode.
	WidgetModeFast WidgetMode = "fast"
	// WidgetModeSlow is the slow mode.
	WidgetModeSlow WidgetMode = "slow"
)

// Widget-state values: a standalone untyped const group.
const (
	WidgetStateOn  = "on"
	WidgetStateOff = "off"
)

// MaxWidgets is a numeric constant; it must NOT surface as an enum value.
const MaxWidgets = 42
